title: ASTARON 12 Pcs Christmas Bell Ornaments Xmas Tree Hanging Ornaments Jingle Bells with Holly Berries for Christmas Wreath Crafts Holiday Tree Decorations (Red)
features: Package Includes: you will receive 12 Christmas bell decorations with holly berries bows in red. Each bell is made up of two small bells, which is very cute and fits the Christmas theme very well.
Material: these Christmas ornaments bells are mainly made of metal, the outer layer is painted with bright colors and is not easy to fade, can make a clear ringing sound.

Widely Applied: the Christmas decorative bells can be hung on the Christmas tree, door, wall, fireplace and any place needs decoration, also suitable for Christmas garland, chandelier, gift packaging, etc., bringing a Christmas festive atmosphere to your home.

Convenient Decoration: there are decorated holly berries and bows of each Christmas bells ornaments, so you can attach bells with rope and plaid ribbon, and then tie the bell to the place you want to decorate; The whole decoration process is simple and convenient
Note: since the single bell is relatively small, the sound it makes is not very loud and is mainly used for decoration.
